description_long: This is a large, multi-engine airplane with a high-mounted straight wing configuration and a robust, utilitarian design. The fuselage is elongated and cylindrical, tapering towards the tail, which features a conventional single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The wings are equipped with multiple engines mounted along the leading edge, suggesting a focus on heavy-lift or transport capabilities. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear, all of which appear fixed and sturdy. The cockpit is positioned at the forward end of the fuselage, with a smoothly contoured nose and a series of windows indicating an enclosed, multi-seat arrangement. The overall appearance is functional and industrial, suitable for cargo or military transport roles.
description: A large, high-wing, multi-engine airplane with a conventional tail, tricycle landing gear, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. Its design is robust and utilitarian, ideal for transport or cargo use.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from a rear-side angle, highlighting the high-mounted wings, multiple engines, and the conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_1: This rear view emphasizes the span of the straight wings, the alignment of the engines, and the full tail assembly.
description_view_2: A rear three-quarter view showing the tapering fuselage, high wing placement, and the robust landing gear under the wings.
description_view_3: A front view displaying the cockpit windows, nose profile, and the symmetrical arrangement of engines along the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles; engines mounted along the leading edge.
attribute_engine_type: Four piston engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear, all fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
